synthesize.title: Synthesize TTS audio
synthesize.alreadyPending: An identical request is already pending — no new request was created.
synthesize.alreadyExists: Asset already generated — no new request was created.

cancelRequest.title: Cancel pending TTS request
cancelRequest.description: Request cancellation of a pending audio narration request. If the worker has already swapped the result, the cancel may not take effect.
cancelRequest.swapCompleted: Cancel requested but the worker already swapped the result.
cancelRequest.alreadyFailed: Request already failed — nothing to cancel.
